description: 常见英语语法错误模式库 - 考研/四六级写作高频错误

entries.pattern: 主语单数 + 谓语动词原形
entries.error_example: The student study hard every day.
entries.correction: The student studies hard every day.
entries.explanation: 当主语为第三人称单数时，一般现在时的谓语动词需加 -s 或 -es。

entries.pattern: 现在完成时与过去时混淆
entries.error_example: I have seen him yesterday.
entries.correction: I saw him yesterday.
entries.explanation: yesterday 是明确的过去时间状语，不能与现在完成时连用，应使用一般过去时。

entries.pattern: 可数名词单数前缺少冠词
entries.error_example: I have important meeting tomorrow.
entries.correction: I have an important meeting tomorrow.
entries.explanation: 可数名词单数 (meeting) 前通常需要冠词 (a/an/the) 或其他限定词。

entries.pattern: 不可数名词前误用不定冠词
entries.error_example: She gave me a good advice.
entries.correction: She gave me good advice.
entries.explanation: advice 为不可数名词，不能与不定冠词 a/an 连用。可用 some 或 a piece of 修饰。

entries.pattern: 动词固定搭配中的介词错误
entries.error_example: I am looking forward to see you.
entries.correction: I am looking forward to seeing you.
entries.explanation: look forward to 中的 to 是介词，后面应接动名词 (seeing)，而不是动词原形。

entries.error_example: I was born in July 15th, 2000.
entries.correction: I was born on July 15th, 2000.
entries.explanation: 具体日期前用 on，月份/年份/季节前用 in，具体时间前用 at。

entries.pattern: 动词后接 to do 还是 doing 混淆
entries.error_example: I enjoy to read books.
entries.correction: I enjoy reading books.
entries.explanation: enjoy 后只能接动名词 (doing)，不能接不定式 (to do)。类似动词还有: avoid, suggest, finish, mind 等。

entries.pattern: 被动语态缺少 be 动词
entries.error_example: The book written by Mark Twain.
entries.correction: The book was written by Mark Twain.
entries.explanation: 被动语态的完整结构为 be + 过去分词，不能省略 be 动词。

entries.error_example: She is more smarter than her brother.
entries.correction: She is smarter than her brother.
entries.explanation: 单音节形容词直接加 -er 构成比较级，不需要 more。more 用于多音节形容词。

entries.pattern: 定语从句关系代词误用
entries.error_example: This is the book which I bought it yesterday.
entries.correction: This is the book which I bought yesterday.
entries.explanation: 定语从句中，关系代词 (which) 已经代替了宾语位置，不需要再用 it。

entries.error_example: If I was you, I would accept the offer.
entries.correction: If I were you, I would accept the offer.
entries.explanation: 与现在事实相反的虚拟条件中，be 动词必须用 were，不论主语是什么。

entries.error_example: She speaks English very good.
entries.correction: She speaks English very well.
entries.explanation: 修饰动词 (speaks) 需要用副词 (well)，而不是形容词 (good)。

entries.error_example: Tom told his father that he had made a mistake.
entries.correction: Tom said to his father, "I have made a mistake."
entries.explanation: 原句中 he 指代不明确（Tom 还是 father），应改写为直接引语或明确指代。

entries.pattern: 否定副词前置时缺少倒装
entries.error_example: Never I have seen such a beautiful sunset.
entries.correction: Never have I seen such a beautiful sunset.
entries.explanation: 否定副词 (Never, Seldom, Hardly, etc.) 位于句首时，主语和谓语动词需要部分倒装。

entries.error_example: Although it was raining, but we went out.
entries.correction: Although it was raining, we went out.
entries.explanation: 英语中 although/though 与 but 不能同时使用，选择一个即可。

entries.error_example: He is first person to arrive.
entries.correction: He is the first person to arrive.
entries.explanation: 序数词 (first, second, third...) 前通常需要加定冠词 the。

entries.error_example: She likes swimming, dancing, and to run.
entries.correction: She likes swimming, dancing, and running.
entries.explanation: 并列连词 and/or 连接的部分应在语法形式上保持一致（平行结构）。

entries.error_example: There are many people have this problem.
entries.correction: There are many people who have this problem.
entries.explanation: There be 结构不能直接再接一个动词，需用定语从句或分词结构连接。

entries.error_example: I very like English.
entries.correction: I like English very much.
entries.explanation: very 只能修饰形容词或副词，不能直接修饰动词。修饰动词喜欢用 very much 或 really。

entries.error_example: Their going to the park over there.
entries.correction: They're going to the park over there.
entries.explanation: Their (物主代词), There (地点), They're (They are 缩写) 三者容易混淆。
